form.formComment: Last start 9th (Fr5) over 2200m at Ascot Park Raceway well beaten by The Greek Freak (2:51.20) on April 2 at $21.50. Two runs back 11th (20m 7) over 2200m at Gore Raceway beaten 60 m by Mister (2:51.10) in 3yo+ on March 19 at $22.10. Must improve sharply.

form.formComment: Last start was well beaten into fourth behind Sheila Laxon at this track over 2400m on April 12 at $3.60. Performed better the start before with a solid effort when 2nd (FrU1) over 2400m at this track, beaten 4 m by Father Ned (3:06.80) on March 26 at $10.30. Looks very hard to beat from the favourable draw.

form.formComment: Resumes. Finished off last campaign when well beaten into seventh behind Kracka Looka at Riverton over 2000m on January 25 at $20.50. Previous preparation first-up posted a big 4 m win (FrU4) at Ascot Park Raceway (2:56.90) beating Garonne in 3yo+ on January 15 at $26.30. Will be hard to beat despite the layoff.
